MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-14-2022 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF PATRICIA MCCOLM'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT VIA ZOOM. THE COURT GRANTS THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS AND FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
